en_title: Dead or Alive 6 Last Round Pummeled by Negative Reviews as Koei Tecmo Asks Players to Rebuy DLC
cn_title: 《死或生6：最终回合》遭差评轰炸，光荣特库摩要求玩家重购DLC
subtitle: 多半差评轰炸
opus_summary: 《死或生6：最终回合》发售后Steam好评率仅23%，玩家不满于大量未修Bug、缺失跨平台联机等功能，以及需重复购买已拥有的DLC，甚至连之前《拳皇》联动角色也无法继承且涨价。光荣特库摩尚未正面回应。

paragraphs.en: has fallen to "Mostly Negative" reviews on Steam as players warn of persistent bugs, lacking features, and a requirement to rebuy some previously owned DLC.
paragraphs.cn: 《死或生6：最终回合》在Steam上的评价已跌至「多半差评」，玩家纷纷警告游戏存在长期未修的Bug、缺失大量功能，并且需要重复购买一部分此前已经拥有的DLC。

paragraphs.en: At the time of this story's publication, only a staggering 23% percent of ratings for the PC version of the 3D fighting game are positive following its June 24, 2026, launch. It all stems from a variety of criticisms being lobbed against the re-release, as veteran players and newcomers alike demand fixes.
paragraphs.cn: 截至本文发稿时，这款3D格斗游戏的PC版在2026年6月24日发售后，好评率只有令人震惊的23%。这一切都源于玩家对这次重新发售抛出的种种批评，老玩家和新玩家一致要求官方给出修复。

paragraphs.en: When Dead or Alive 6 Last Round arrived last week, it replaced the now-delisted . Koei Tecmo and Team Ninja positioned the new version as a slight upgrade that bundles in new features, with the promise that new DLC is also in development.
paragraphs.cn: 《死或生6：最终回合》上周上线后，取代了现已下架的《死或生6》。光荣特库摩和Team Ninja将这一新版定位为一次小幅升级，打包加入了一些新功能，并承诺还有新DLC正在开发中。

paragraphs.en: Priced at $40, it also includes five previously released add-on characters, as well as five new costumes. A free-to-play version, subtitled "Core Fighters," is also available but does not include the story mode and limits the roster to Kasumi, Marie Rose, Honoka, and NiCO.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏售价40美元(约合人民币272元)，包含五名此前已推出的追加角色和五套新服装。另有一个副标题为「Core Fighters」的免费版，但不包含故事模式，且可操作角色仅限于霞、玛丽·萝丝、穗香和NiCO。

paragraphs.en: In the seven years since its first launch, the game has accumulated a list of 440 DLCs, and although a portion of that includes bundle offers, some quick math makes it painfully clear that there is a lot that does not come with Dead or Alive 6 Last Round. This point of contention is just the tip of the iceberg for fans, with many also pointing out that those who previously owned the add-on content can transfer most – but not all – of it to the new game.
paragraphs.cn: 自初版发售以来的七年里，该作累积了440款DLC。尽管其中一部分是捆绑包优惠，但简单算一下就能痛感有大量内容并未收录在《死或生6：最终回合》里。这个矛盾对粉丝来说只是冰山一角，许多人还指出，以前拥有那些附加内容的玩家可以将大部分——但不是全部——继承到新版游戏中。

paragraphs.en: "Good game but the negative review stays until the game comes with all the 7 year old DLC from the previous edition of the game," one Steam review .
paragraphs.cn: 一条Steam评测写道：「游戏不错，但我保留差评，直到游戏把前作七年来所有的DLC都包含进来。」

paragraphs.en: Even if one player had theoretically purchased every last character and costume pack prior to that June 24 launch date, Dead or Alive 6 Last Round would still bar them from two of its playable DLC fighters: Mai Shiranui and Kula Diamond. An explanation on the Team Ninja website clarified that Mai and Kula and their costumes cannot be carried over.
paragraphs.cn: 即便有玩家在6月24日发售前把所有角色和服装包都买遍了，《死或生6：最终回合》仍会锁住两名可下载的格斗角色：不知火舞和库拉·戴尔蒙德。Team Ninja官网的说明表示，不知火舞和库拉以及她们的服装无法继承。

paragraphs.en: The two King of Fighters crossover characters are the exceptions to Koei Tecmo's transfer plan, meaning players need to pay extra cash to unlock them even if they had already done so for the 2019 release. To make matters worse, as pointed out by , both Mai and Kula used to cost $8 each – now they're $11.
paragraphs.cn: 这两个《拳皇》联动角色是光荣特库摩转移计划的例外，意味着玩家哪怕在2019年版游戏里已经付费解锁过，现在仍需另外掏钱。更糟糕的是，正如有人指出的那样，不知火舞和库拉此前各自售价8美元(约合人民币54元)——现在却要11美元(约合人民币75元)。

paragraphs.en: Koei Tecmo's updates to the base experience have done little to cushion the blow. The main selling point here, as laid out on the Dead or Alive 6 Last Round website , is the promise that the game has been "improved and updated for current-gen hardware," but most players are struggling to find any noticeable changes. Some of the more vicious " " allegations point out that the pause menu still features a graphic for the 2015 iteration of the Steam controller.
paragraphs.cn: 光荣特库摩对基础体验的更新几乎没能缓冲这一冲击。正如《死或生6：最终回合》官网所写，这次最大的卖点是承诺游戏「已为当代硬件进行了改进与升级」，但大多数玩家实在找不到任何明显变化。一些更恶毒的「诈骗」指控还指出，暂停菜单上依然显示着2015款Steam手柄的图示。

paragraphs.en: "It's the same exact game with the same bugs that were reported 6 years ago with a few changes," another Steam review , "so my review is the same but without the 5.5K hours of modding the game...and no mouse navigation in the menus too. Also mods are now broken."
paragraphs.cn: 另一条Steam评测写道：「这完全就是同一款游戏，带着六年前就报告过的同样Bug，只改了那么一丁点。所以我的评测也和以前一样，只不过没有了那5500小时做Mod的经历……菜单里也不支持鼠标操作。而且Mod现在全坏了。」

paragraphs.en: "I thought there would be some sort of differences to this than base DOA6 like noticeable graphics improvements or better character models with more details," another , "but it's the exact ******* same. No wonder there was basically no info on this before its release. If there are any differences, they're so minor that I can't tell. There is literally no need to currently buy this if you already have base DOA6."
paragraphs.cn: 又有玩家写道：「我本来以为它比起原版DOA6会有点不同，比如明显的画面提升，或者细节更丰富的角色模型，结果******完全一样。难怪发售前几乎没任何情报。就算真有区别，也微小到我根本看不出来。如果你已经有原版DOA6，现在完全没理由买这款。」

paragraphs.en: Dead or Alive 6 Last Round's other major selling point is its new photo mode, though it appears to be a drop in the bucket compared to what was expected. Instead of sharing creations online, most players are voicing concerns about bugs that have persisted through releases, as well as missing features, such as crossplay or rollback netcode.
paragraphs.cn: 《死或生6：最终回合》的另一大卖点是新增的拍照模式，但相较玩家预期不过是杯水车薪。大多数玩家并没有在分享作品，而是在吐槽那些延续至各版本都不修的Bug，以及缺失的功能，比如跨平台联机或回滚式网络代码。

paragraphs.en: "There's no balance changes, no major visual changes, all they did was add a new photo mode and lighting changes," one reviewer . "The new character coming is DLC and didn't release with the launch of the game, so who knows if it will be free or not."
paragraphs.cn: 一位评测者写道：「没有平衡性调整，没有大的视觉改动，他们就是加了个新的拍照模式，调了调光照。即将到来的新角色是DLC，没跟着游戏本体一起推出，天知道会不会免费。」

paragraphs.en: They continued: "This hurts, man. It feels like Team Ninja/Koei Tecmo just don't care about DoA anymore. I honestly don't even dislike DoA6 mechanics outside of the meter system, but Last Round just feels kinda scammy."
paragraphs.cn: 这位玩家继续说道：「这太伤人了。感觉Team Ninja/光荣特库摩已经不在乎《死或生》了。说真的，除了能量槽系统，我并不讨厌DOA6的机制，但《最终回合》就是让人觉得有点坑钱。」

paragraphs.en: Steam reviews for Dead or Alive 6 Last Round are filled with comments calling it " ," " ," an " ," and much, much more. Koei Tecmo and Team Ninja have not officially commented on the uproar. What they have commented on, however, is the first post-launch DLC: a new character named Minato. How much they will cost is unclear.
paragraphs.cn: 《死或生6：最终回合》的Steam评测充斥着诸如「欺诈」「笑话」「可耻」以及更多更狠的字眼。光荣特库摩和Team Ninja尚未就这场风波正式发声。不过，他们倒是提到了发售后首个DLC：一名叫作Minato的新角色。这个角色定价尚不清楚。

paragraphs.en: IGN's called Dead or Alive 6 Last Round a "great fighting game wrapped up in a very bad package" when it launched for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X | S last week. We added that it does "little to justify why this re-release wasn't just another DLC pack." IGN gave the original version of the game a .
paragraphs.cn: IGN在评测中称，《死或生6：最终回合》是一个「包裹在非常糟糕的包装中的优秀格斗游戏」，并于上周登陆了PC、PS5和XBOX Series。我们补充道，它「几乎没有给出任何足以说明为什么这次再版不只是一个DLC包的理由」。IGN给原版游戏打出了……。
